Fragment A (end of page 28):

Fragment B (start of page 29):
"We experimented with two different designs. (1) A combination of multiple binary classifiers where the final decision is obtained by selecting the language having the highest score after a threshold is applied. If none of the classifiers surpass its threshold, the sentence is filtered out. (2) A multiclass classifier using softmax over all possible languages. In this case, the threshold optimization is done after the softmax."
